Query.SQL: SELECT CT.CODE AS "CT.CODE" , CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME" , CT.DX_NUMBER AS "CT.DX_NUMBER" , CT.TEL_NO AS "CT.TEL_NO" , CT.FAX_NO AS "CT.FAX_NO" , CT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY AS "CT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY" FROM COURTS CT WHERE CT.CODE = ${param.courtId} AND CT.CASEMAN_INSERVICE = 'Y'

SELECT GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 as "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE GA.COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId} AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = ${param.addressType} AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL
